title: FULL STACK AI ENGINEER
description: Make Your Mark Every DayAt AGC, you change the world with innovative materials, technology and solutions. Working closely in an inclusive and international team, your ideas and expertise take on new value. And following the highest performance and ethical standards, the challenges you overcome will improve daily life for millions of people.This position will be based in one of our main AGC European locations (Czech Republic, Spain, Morocco or Belgium).In every place, the atmosphere reflects our values of inclusion and diversity: we value the uniqueness of individuals and the different perspectives and talents they bring to AGC. Our teams have a great exposure to different aspects of glass business and new technologies. They are driven by collaboration, motivation, curiosity and respect for autonomy. This makes daily work enjoyable and life easier.Come and join us!We are looking for a talented and passionate Full Stack AI Engineer to join our dynamic and highly impactful AI Competence Center. The successful candidate will contribute to the design, development, and deployment of a wide range of AI solutions, including machine learning models, agentic AI systems, and automated pipelines. This is an exciting opportunity to work on cutting-edge projects and contribute to the advancement of AI within the company.Role and Responsibilities:You will design, build, and maintain efficient, reusable, and reliable Python code.You will develop and implement machine learning models and algorithms.You will build and deploy agentic AI systems and automated pipelines.You will contribute to the development and improvement of our in-house integrated AI platform.You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify opportunities for AI integration.Required Qualifications:Proven experience in AI/ Data Science with strong exposure to Software Engineering.Your Profile:A Master's degree in Information Technology, Mathematics, Statistics, Physics, or a related field.Experience in delivering AI, machine learning, or data-driven projects.Experience with deep learning frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, …).Familiarity with AI agent frameworks such as MCP, A2A, and LangChain.Strong proficiency in Python, JavaScript, and TypeScript, as well as experience with relevant frameworks such as React, FastAPI, and Prefect.Solid understanding of software development principles and best practices.Practical experience with DevOps and Automation.Experience in LLM application development is an asset.Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Google Cloud, Azure) is a plus.Experience in optimization is a plus.You should also have the following attributes:Desire to be a team player of a growing structure.Strong analytical skills with the ability to collect, organize, analyze and interpret large amounts of data to underline the relevant information regarding a specific business objective.Problem-solving mindset and ability to understand business requirements.Hands-on attitude.Innate care about work quality.Ability to interact at all levels, from the front-line staff to the executive team, with data experts (internal and external) and non-experts alike.Learning agility.
